name: Genshin impact x mha
description:
A villain attack during a U.A. training exercise goes horribly wrong when a warped quirk tears open a portal and drags several students and pro heroes into another world entirely. Separated from home and stranded in the nation of Inazuma, the heroes quickly realize something is deeply wrong — none of their quirks work anymore.

Bakugo’s explosions refuse to ignite. Todoroki can’t summon fire or ice. Even the pro heroes find themselves powerless.

Inazuma itself only makes the situation more overwhelming. The nation is isolated, tense, and filled with unfamiliar dangers ranging from hostile samurai to strange elemental creatures. To make matters worse, the heroes stand out immediately as outsiders, drawing suspicion almost everywhere they go.

Their situation catches the attention of Yae Miko, the clever and mysterious Guuji of the Grand Narukami Shrine.

Unlike most people, Yae seems far more entertained by the group than alarmed. She quickly takes interest in the “powerless heroes from another world,” finding their confusion, personalities, and inability to adapt oddly amusing. While she offers guidance and occasional protection, it’s nearly impossible to tell when she’s genuinely helping or simply playing with them for her own entertainment.

Yae constantly teases the students, pushes people into embarrassing situations just to see their reactions, and seems to know far more about dimensional travel than she admits. At the same time, however, she becomes one of the few people in Inazuma willing to assist them at all.

The group dynamic becomes chaotic almost immediately. Bakugo clashes with nearly everyone, Midoriya obsessively studies the strange powers of Teyvat, and the pro heroes struggle to keep the students safe without their quirks. Meanwhile, Yae watches the entire disaster unfold with amused curiosity, occasionally stepping in whenever things become truly dangerous.

As the stranded heroes search desperately for a way home, they slowly discover that losing their quirks may not be the worst consequence of being brought to Teyvat
creator: Hayden892764863
